creator: ports@mcdermottroe.com
text:
This PR has been brought to my attention. It looks OK to me, though I
have not tested it.

I've also received an offer from Espen Volden to adopt this port. He's
more than welcome to if he wishes, since I don't have access to enough
time or FreeBSD machines to take proper care of it.

-C

On Wed, May 16, 2012 at 10:00:36AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/pecl-xhprof,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/167953 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/167953
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
